_meta.description: Industry-wide GI segment premium (Health / Motor / Fire / Crop / Marine / Other). Drives Market Engine main chart.
_meta.notes: FY25/FY26 are the canonical GI Council Segment-wise Report figures (Industry Total row) from the official segment_march_2026 XLSX, fetched via the muns agent (data/agent-pulls/industry-segment-history/). They replace the earlier CareRatings-seeded FY25 estimate (health 122,800 was a 40%-share back-of-envelope; the canonical FY25 health is 118,857.63). FY24 (health + total) is the GI Council FY24 full-year read; FY24 motor and the FY15-FY23 history still await the IRDAI Handbook PDFs (links captured in the agent answer). 'Others' = Total non-life − Health − Motor (identity over the GI Council segment totals). Basis: GI Council 'Health' includes overseas medical, excludes personal accident.

provenance.source_name: GI Council Segment-wise Report — Gross Direct Premium Underwritten (Industry Total), upto March 2026 (FY26, provisional & unaudited)
